description_long: This chest of drawers is a classic wooden furniture piece with a polished, glossy finish and a warm brown wood grain. The front features a symmetrical arrangement with four central drawers, each equipped with round metallic knob handles, flanked by two cabinet doors on either side. The legs are turned and slightly ornate, adding a touch of traditional elegance to the overall design. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. The side panels are plain, highlighting the natural wood pattern, while the back is unadorned. No visible locks or branding are present, and the construction suggests a sturdy, solid wood build.
description: A polished brown wooden chest of drawers with four central drawers, two side cabinets, and ornate turned legs. Features metallic knob handles and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: The back view shows a plain, unadorned wooden panel with the turned legs visible at the bottom.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the depth of the chest, the overhanging top, and the profile of the turned legs.
description_view_2: The front view displays four central drawers with metallic knobs, two side cabinet doors, and all decorative legs.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the depth, overhanging top, and leg profile.
